title: vigolina
intro: Vigolina, also known as Vinca major, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, but widely naturalized in other parts of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of vigolina include reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Vigolina is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
